name: WaveForm Audio Converter
summary: A lightweight, powerful tool to convert, trim, and apply effects to audio files.
description: WaveForm is the essential utility for any audio producer on Windows. It offers batch conversion for multiple audio formats (WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG), precise audio trimming, and a suite of basic effects like normalization and fading. Its intuitive interface and high-performance backend make audio processing a breeze.

behind_the_scenes.development: Built with C# and the .NET Framework for maximum performance and compatibility on Windows systems.
behind_the_scenes.motivation: Created to fill a need for a simple, no-nonsense audio converter without the bloat of larger digital audio workstations.
